summary: Iteration 47 - CartPage responsive testing complete. Verified cart and checkout flow on both mobile (390px) and desktop (1920px). All responsive features working correctly. Cart counter updates in header, verified badge displays, address selection works, discount code functionality works, new address form displays correctly. Minor i18n translation key issues found.

issues: Translation keys showing instead of translated text: 'checkout.emailVerified', 'checkout.continueShopping', 'header.searchPlaceholder', 'header.stores'

passed_tests: Login as customer (test@example.com / password123) - SUCCESS
Navigate to /products and add product to cart - SUCCESS (Cold-Pressed Orange Juice added)
Cart counter in header updates - SUCCESS (shows '1')
Mobile cart counter updates - SUCCESS (shows '1')
DESKTOP (1920px): 2-column layout (lg:grid-cols-3) - SUCCESS
DESKTOP (1920px): Order summary sticky on right side - SUCCESS
DESKTOP (1920px): Breadcrumbs visible - SUCCESS
DESKTOP (1920px): Delete button visible (hidden md:flex) - SUCCESS
DESKTOP (1920px): Product image visible in cart item - SUCCESS
MOBILE (390px): Compact layout with small image (w-16 h-16) - SUCCESS
MOBILE (390px): Delete button as icon only - SUCCESS
MOBILE (390px): Address cards in single column grid - SUCCESS
MOBILE (390px): Order summary stacks below cart items - SUCCESS
MOBILE (390px): Breadcrumbs hidden - SUCCESS
Verified badge (green checkmark) visible - SUCCESS
Shipping address selection working - SUCCESS (saved address with checkmark)
New address form displays correctly - SUCCESS (all 7 fields present)
Discount code input visible - SUCCESS
Apply discount button visible - SUCCESS
Remove discount functionality - SUCCESS
Checkout button shows correct total (€6.99) - SUCCESS
Checkout button enabled when email verified and address selected - SUCCESS
action_items: FIX i18n: Translation keys showing instead of translated text - 'checkout.emailVerified', 'checkout.continueShopping', 'header.searchPlaceholder', 'header.stores'
critical_code_review_comments: CartPage.js: Responsive design correctly implemented with grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3
CartPage.js: Mobile delete button (md:hidden) and desktop delete button (hidden md:flex) properly separated
CartPage.js: Order summary has lg:sticky lg:top-24 for desktop sticky behavior
CartPage.js: Address grid uses grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 for responsive layout
CartPage.js: All data-testid attributes present for testing
Header.js: Cart counter badge properly displays with data-testid='cart-count' and 'mobile-cart-count'
CartContext.js: Cart state management working correctly with addToCart, removeFromCart, getTotalItems
index.css: Mobile-first CSS with proper breakpoints and safe area padding

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all responsive features working, minor i18n issues)

seed_data_creation: Created session token for test@example.com user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 47 verified CartPage responsive design. Key findings: 1) Desktop shows 2-column layout with sticky order summary. 2) Mobile shows compact single-column layout with icon-only delete buttons. 3) Cart counter updates correctly in both mobile and desktop headers. 4) Address selection and new address form work correctly. 5) Discount code functionality works. 6) Minor i18n issue: some translation keys showing instead of translated text.

mobile_390px.header: WORKING - Mobile header with cart counter badge '1'
mobile_390px.cart_item: WORKING - Compact with small image (w-16 h-16), icon-only delete button
mobile_390px.address_section: WORKING - Single column grid for address cards
mobile_390px.order_summary: WORKING - Stacks below cart items (not sticky)

desktop_1920px.header: WORKING - Desktop header with cart counter badge '1'
desktop_1920px.cart_item: WORKING - Full layout with larger image, text delete button
desktop_1920px.order_summary: WORKING - Sticky on right side (lg:sticky lg:top-24)

i18n_issues: checkout.emailVerified - showing key instead of 'Email Verified'
checkout.continueShopping - showing key instead of 'Continue Shopping'
header.searchPlaceholder - showing key instead of placeholder text
